home health services, the patient’s skilled need and homebound status can be 
substantiated through an examination of all submitted medical record documentation 
from the certifying physician or allowed practitioner, acute/post-acute care facility, 
and/or HHA (see below). The synthesis of progress notes, diagnostic findings,
